content.about: Stubbs Estates specializes in the consignment and sale of fine objects, including art, jewelry, antiques, and collectible items in Wichita, KS. They are a BBB A+ rated business providing estate appraisal and estate sales services throughout the Wichita metro area.
content.notes: BBB A+ rated. Active in the Wichita community with regular estate sales and fine art appraisals.

content.about: Estate Chics is a Wichita-based estate sale and antique company offering professional antique appraisals, jewelry appraisals, and estate liquidation services. They are a BBB A rated business serving Butler, Harvey, Kingman, Reno, Sedgwick, and Sumner Counties in Kansas.
content.notes: Serves multiple counties across central Kansas. BBB A rated.

address.formatted: 301 Commercial St, Emporia, KS 66801 (Serves Wichita Area)

content.about: Poehler Mercantile Antique is a BBB A+ rated antique dealer and appraiser serving the Wichita area from their Emporia, KS location. They offer professional antique appraisals and sales of quality antiques and collectibles.
content.notes: BBB A+ rated. Located in Emporia, KS but serves the greater Wichita area.

appraisers.name: Denice S. Morris - Art of Estates Appraiser

address.formatted: 6222 E 21st St N, Ste 120, Wichita, KS 67208

content.about: Denice S. Morris is an Accredited Senior Appraiser with the American Society of Appraisers (ASA), having joined in 1996. Based in Wichita, KS, she specializes in fine art, antiques, Native American antiquities, and pottery. She has been featured as an appraiser at PBS Antiques Fairs. Denice provides USPAP-compliant appraisal reports for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and equitable distribution.
content.notes: Featured PBS Antiques Fair appraiser. ASA member since 1996. Specializes in Native American art and pottery.

content.about: ValuePros Appraisal Services is a family-owned appraisal firm operating since 1976. They serve the Wichita, KS area with USPAP-compliant appraisal reports for antiques, collectibles, fine art, and personal property. As independent accredited appraisers with no personal interest in clients' items, they provide unbiased valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and legal matters.
content.notes: Family owned since 1976. Independent appraisers serving Wichita KS and surrounding areas.

content.about: Kansas Auction & Estate Services provides professional antique appraisals, estate sales, and liquidation services in the Wichita area. They handle everything from single-item antique valuations to full estate liquidations, serving families and individuals throughout south-central Kansas.
content.notes: Serves Wichita KS and south-central Kansas. Full-service estate and auction firm.

content.about: Allied Estate Services provides antique appraisal and estate sale services in the Wichita, KS area. They offer comprehensive estate consulting, including personal property valuations, antique appraisals, estate sales, and cleanout services for families throughout the Wichita metro area.
content.notes: Serves Wichita KS and surrounding communities. Full-service estate consulting.
